3013310.name: Fantasy Grounds - Cursed Scroll Zine, Vol. 1: Diablerie!
3013310.description:
Cursed Scroll Zine, Vol. 1: Diablerie!

Cursed knights channeling demonic power, mist-addled forests where witches and warlocks stalk the trees, and crumbling castles housing ancient, eldritch creatures!
Cursed Scroll 1 for the Shadowdark RPG adds diabolical new ideas to your RPG game world! Inside, you'll find: 
  • The Hideous Halls of Mugdulblub, a 1st-level dungeon crawl heavy on exploration, factions, and sorcerous wonder
  • The Gloaming, a gloomwrought hex crawl in a misty, demon-haunted forest and swamp
  • Three new classes for Shadowdark RPG: witch, warlock, and knight of St. Ydris
  • 36 new spells, 6 eldritch warlock patrons, 20 character backgrounds
  • 14 new monsters, including the legendary Willowman!
  • Classic, hand-drawn Game Master and Player maps
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Michael Putlack, and Kevin Heffernan
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and a one time purchase of the Shadowdark RPG ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
